name: Sweet and Sour Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a slow cooker.
2. Trim excess fat from the roast; brown it on all sides in a skillet using hot oil.
3. Put the meat into the slow cooker.
4. Discard all but 1 tablespoon of drippings from the skillet, then sauté the onion until tender.
5. Stir together the tomato sauce, brown sugar, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, and salt.
6. Pour the mixture over the meat and potatoes.
7. Cover and cook on high for 4-5 hours or until the meat is tender.
8. Before serving, pour the sauce into a skillet.
9. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until thickened; serve with the potatoes and meat.
